headline: Seoul Economic Daily: South Korea national gasoline average 1,938.6 won/L on April 4; Seoul at 1,976.7
data_point: National average 1,938.6 won/L; government monitoring for potential 3rd revision to price cap

headline: South Korea raises max EV subsidy to ₩6.8M and adds ₩1M ICE trade-in bonus; total EV budget ₩936B
data_point: Max subsidy raised from 5.8M won to 6.8M won; new ICE trade-in bonus of 1M won; total 2026 EV budget at 936B won ($658M)

headline: Vietnam extends 100% EV registration fee exemption until February 2027; SCT held at 1-3%

headline: SCMP: Iran war oil shock accelerates Southeast Asia's EV revolution; Hanoi to ban fossil-fuel motorcycles July 1
data_point: VinFast demand spiking; Hanoi banning fossil-fuel motorcycles from Ring Road 1 from July 1, 2026

headline: Christian Science Monitor: China's renewable energy push means it was better prepared for the global fuel crisis
data_point: China gasoline at CNY 9.20/L (~$1.33/L) as of Mar 30; NDRC reimposed retail price controls for first time since 2013

headline: Gasgoo: China fuel prices approaching ¥9/L era; NDRC next adjustment due April 7
data_point: Most provinces near or at ¥9/litre benchmark; government watching for pass-through to manufacturing costs

headline: Ola Electric hits 1M cumulative registrations; TVS Motor leads e2W segment with 340,758 units in FY26
data_point: Ola Electric 150% MoM growth in March; TVS Motor e2W 340,758 units (+43% YoY) leads segment in FY26

headline: India petrol/diesel hold steady April 4 at ₹94.77/₹87.67 in Delhi as Brent drops toward $100
data_point: Prices held flat; excise cut now ₹3/L on petrol (zero on diesel); OMCs absorbing ~₹24/L under-recovery on petrol

headline: AAA: US national average exceeds $4/gallon for first time in 4 years
data_point: $4.08/gal national average on April 2; up $1.08 from one month ago; highest since August 2022

headline: Electrek: At $4+ gasoline, average driver saves $300-$400/month switching to EV

headline: UK EV leasing inquiries +36% since Iran war; Octopus cuts EV charging to 5.5p/kWh from April 1

headline: The Driven: March 2026 EV sales by model & brand — Tesla Model Y leads at 2,818 units; BYD, Zeekr surge
data_point: Tesla 3,485 total in March; Model Y 2,818 (incl. 6-seat Model Y L); EV share approaches record monthly high

headline: Vietnam secures fuel supply through April; refineries at full output amid Hormuz supply fears
data_point: 3.2M cubic metres imported in March + 1.6-1.8M cubic metres inventory; Dung Quat & Nghi Son secured through end-April

headline: Vietnam Ministry of Industry proposes state budget advance mechanism for fuel price stabilisation fund
data_point: Fund balance down to ~VND 320B after 9 taps disbursing VND 5.3T; PM allocated VND 8T from surplus 2025 budget

headline: Autocar Pro: Record 1.4 million e2Ws sold in FY2026 — 57% share of India's 2.45M total EV sales
Autocar India: Electric 2-wheeler sales hit record 1.91 lakh in March 2026 (+45% YoY)
Norway surpasses 1 million EVs on the road — cumulative fleet milestone reached in March 2026

headline: Electrek: New EV sales drop 28% in Q1 2026 as tax credit expiry bites
data_point: 212,600 new BEVs sold in Q1 2026 — down from 296,304 a year earlier; first full quarter without $7,500 federal credit

headline: Electric Cars Report: Used EV demand surges 12% to near-record as new sales crater
data_point: 93,500 used EVs sold in Q1; avg price $34,821, only ~$1,300 above comparable ICE — displaced demand from new market

headline: NY Auto Show: Hyundai CEO cites rising CA fuel prices driving renewed EV demand — 'market conditions, not regulation'

headline: The British Eye: UK fuel prices hit record monthly rise; petrol avg 156p/L, some London stations >200p/L

data_point: Prices 15–17% above pre-Hormuz blockade level; CO₂ levy adding 17–19 cts/L on top of supply shock premium

headline: YourNews: Tesla Korea registrations surge 330% YoY in March 2026; 11,134 units registered

data_point: WTI crude at $115.48/barrel; Brent ~$112; national average at $4.08/gallon as of April 2 — first time above $4 since Aug 2022

headline: Electric Car Scheme: UK government increases EV home charger grants to £500 from April 2026 covering renters and flat owners

data_point: 1.78 lakh E2W in March | +59% MoM | West Asia conflict and rising fuel prices cited as primary driver; TVS Motor now #1 E2W brand

headline: BEVs outsell petrol cars in Germany for first time in a March — 70,663 BEVs (+66% YoY, 24% share)

headline: Imported EVs overtake hybrids for first time (47.8% share); Tesla top imported brand Q1 2026

headline: CNN: $4/gallon gasoline? EV drivers say they don't care — highlight savings of $300-400/month vs ICE amid fuel crisis
data_point: EV consideration hit 23.8% of all car shopper research activity in mid-March, highest weekly level of 2026; online EV searches +17% in one week

headline: MarkLines: Cambodia scraps EV import taxes effective April 1 2026; duties on BEV family cars cut from 35% to 0%
data_point: BEV import duty: 35% → 0%; PHEV family cars: 35% → 7%; part of broader push to meet 41.7% emissions reduction target by 2030

headline: Gazeta.uz: Uzbekistan to promote EVs with preferential loans at 16% (vs 23% market rate), subsidies, and tax incentives

data_point: EVs now >10% of monthly 2-wheeler sales for first time; 2025 EV sales tripled to 90,000 units; PAVE subsidy received 270,000 applications (7x target)

headline: The Star: Laos slashes EV registration fees 30%, hikes petrol car charges 30% under emergency measures to curb fuel use
data_point: Transport companies must have 10% EV fleets by end-2026; excise tax review underway; EV target: 30% of vehicles by 2030; charging network: 100 stations by 2026

headline: CNBC: India-China relations ease as Indian business delegation visits China for first time in 5 years; 6 of 8 firms in EV/clean energy
data_point: March 29–April 4 visit; 6 of 8 companies in EV charging, e-trucks, battery storage; bilateral trade +22.5% YoY in Jan-Feb 2026; exploring battery and charging JVs

headline: Asia Times: Shared energy stakes call for greater China-India cooperation — Iran war underscores both nations' fossil fuel vulnerability
data_point: China supplies 85% of India's lithium-ion battery imports; India purchased $7B+ of Chinese batteries over last 5 years; cooperation driven by Hormuz disruption

headline: Electrek: BYD EV orders surge to "another level" overseas; Wang Chuanfu calls oil crisis a "golden window" for global expansion
data_point: Selling 2 weeks of cars in a day in AU/NZ/PH; most orders at Bangkok Motor Show; 2026 export target raised to 1.5M (+15%)

headline: Roastbrief: BYD launches "Money" ad campaign across Europe explicitly targeting fuel price anxiety; ads placed near petrol stations
data_point: Brazilian-origin film adapted for EU markets; Dolphin Mini positioned as fuel-cost antidote; DOOH ads strategically placed at petrol stations and charging points

headline: Nikkei Asia: BYD hails windfall as Iran oil crisis supercharges Chinese EV outlook; chairman sees overseas sales at "another level"
data_point: BYD chairman Wang Chuanfu told analysts fuel prices will push overseas sales higher; turmoil came at ideal time for China EV industry facing domestic price wars

headline: CNN: Worst oil crisis in history comes at a good time for China's troubled EV giants — structural demand, not just cyclical
data_point: China manufactures/exports more EVs than any nation; crisis coincides with more models, better range, lower prices — suggesting structural shift

headline: Mirage News: Polestar UK reporting test drive bookings tripled since Iran conflict; showroom traffic at "sale event" levels
data_point: Enquiries 3x since late Feb; test drive bookings tripled in 2 weeks; showroom foot traffic matching peak sale periods

headline: Octopus Electric Vehicles selling ~4x more used EVs than six months ago; CEO calls it evidence of "real demand" not just curiosity
data_point: Used EV sales volume quadrupled in 6 months; Octopus CEO interpreting growth as genuine demand signal; EV charging cut to 5.5p/kWh from April 1

headline: Kia UK: EV test drive requests up 84% since February 2025 as fuel crisis and new models drive demand
data_point: Test drive bookings +84% YoY; coincides with expanded EV lineup (EV3, EV5, EV6) and rising fuel costs

headline: Renault: EV model enquiries on website up 24% since February 28; Renault 5 and Scenic E-Tech leading demand
data_point: Website EV enquiries +24% since Iran war began; Renault 5 E-Tech and Scenic E-Tech driving interest

headline: BYD UK: New model advert views up 77% YoY; searches for used BYD vehicles up more than 375%
data_point: New model ad views +77% YoY; used BYD searches +375%; brand awareness accelerating in UK market

headline: "Pump anxiety" replacing "range anxiety" as dominant consumer mindset shift — cost of fueling ICE now bigger concern than EV range
data_point: Industry executives and analysts noting narrative flip: consumers now more worried about petrol costs than EV charging; structural shift in purchase consideration

headline: Battery-powered model sales up 15% YoY in first two months across Europe; EVs now 19% of EU new car market, 22% of UK market
data_point: EU BEV share: 19% of new car market (Jan-Feb 2026); UK BEV share: 22%; +15% volume YoY across Europe

headline: Reuters: MG (SAIC) running social media ad campaign in France: "It may be time to rethink the way you drive"
data_point: MG France ad explicitly targets fuel cost narrative; parallel to BYD's 'Money' ad campaign across Europe; Stellantis-owned Aramis Auto reports +50% EV interest

headline: Marketcheck UK: Daily used EV sales peak above 1,100/day post-war vs typical 600-900/day pre-war
data_point: Pre-war daily volume range: ~561-965 units; post-war peaks above 1,100/day; "clear and sustained escalation" in sales since Feb 28; used EVs ~40% cheaper than new

headline: Finn.no analyst Terje Dahlgren: "Currently an electric car bonanza in the used market"
data_point: EVs have overtaken diesel as best-selling fuel type on Finn.no; parent company Vend (VEND.OL) operates Nordic platforms

headline: Reuters: Tesla March registrations soar in key European markets — France +203%, Norway +178%
data_point: France 9,569 (+203% YoY, just below Dec 2023 all-time high of 9,572); Norway 6,150 (+178%); Sweden 1,447 (+144%); Denmark 1,784 (+96%); Belgium 1,806 (+89%); Netherlands 1,819 (+72%); Italy 2,920 (+32%); Spain 2,477 (+25%); Switzerland 674 (+1.7%); Portugal 1,189 (-1.7%). Q1: France +108%, Norway +95%, Denmark +50%, Sweden +48%, Spain +43%, Italy +32%. BNP Paribas/Cetelem (Flavien Neuvy): 'Impact on March registrations still marginal as that plays more on order books — we'll see the effects of this Iran war factor over the coming months.' Renault/Dacia France CEO: inquiries for electric and LPG cars at dealerships and on websites have spiked.

headline: DTI pivots from combustion-friendly RACE to EV Incentive Strategy (EVIS) as crisis response; EO pending
data_point: Dept of Trade and Industry drops RACE programme in favour of EVIS following Marcos Mar 24 State of National Energy Emergency (EO 110); framework: ~PHP 9B per EV manufacturer, production support up to 40% of tooling/equipment investment, tax breaks, charging mandates. DOJ legal opinion issued Mar 29; FIRB review ongoing as of Apr 6-8; executive order not yet issued.
